title: Lyyt | Set of 3 Battery Powered COB LED Push Lights, Self Adhesive – Bright, Long-Lasting, & Easy to Install | Wardrobes, Cupboards, Under Stairs, Deep Drawers & Attic Spaces
features: Set of three COB LED push lights for versatile use
Bright, cool white light with a 6000K color temperature
Easy installation with strong adhesive pads
Long-lasting LEDs with up to 100,000 hours of life
Each light requires 3 AAA batteries (not included)
description: From the manufacturer Lyyt | Set of 3 Battery Powered COB LED Push Lights Illuminate those dark, hard-to-reach spaces effortlessly with our set of three Battery Powered COB LED Push Lights. Designed for convenience and versatility, these compact lights are perfect for brightening up wardrobes, cupboards, under-stair areas, deep drawers, and attic spaces. Equipped with powerful COB LEDs, they deliver a brilliant, cool white light with a colour temperature of 6000K, ensuring clear visibility wherever you need it most. With a long-lasting LED lifetime of up to 100,000 hours, you can rely on consistent lighting without frequent replacements. Each light is easy to install with a strong adhesive pad, allowing you to fix them securely in place without any tools. Their sleek dimensions of 68 x 18mm and lightweight design at just 25g make them a discreet yet effective lighting solution. These push lights require 3 AAA batteries each (not included), making them portable and efficient options for all your lighting needs. Whether you're organizing your wardrobe or navigating through your attic, our set of three COB LED Push Lights is the perfect addition to illuminate your space with ease.
